series_metadata.series_description: The purpose of these files is to maintain a record of Dam Safety Annual Fee program documents. These include internal reports, audit reports, audit related documents and similar records as well as records pertaining to referral to the Ohio Attorney General's Office for collection.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Unless converted to electronic form, retain until audited by Auditor of State, any audit report is released and all discrepancies resolved. Then destroy ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State, any audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. Then destroy, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
